zh.Bulwick, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾布爾維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Boulers於1097年出生在英國越可爾霍沃思時，她的父親Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery10歲，母親Sybil de Falaise23歲。她和Richard FitzUrse至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世在英國薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Boulers于1097年出生在英国越可爾霍沃思时，她的父亲Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery10岁，母亲Sybil de Falaise23岁。她和Richard FitzUrse至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世在英国薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Boulers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Bowler  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Bowler
meanings: English (mainly East Midlands): occupational name from an unrecorded Middle English word boler ‘worker at a bole or lead-mining site’ (Middle English bole ‘bowl’), here denoting a round cavity on top of a high hill, where lead was smelted.

English: occupational name from Middle English bollere, boler, bolour, bulour ‘maker or seller of bowls, dishes, or cups’ (from Old English bolla ‘bowl, drinking vessel’ + the agent suffix -er, and Old French bole, bule ‘bowl’). Medieval bowls were made of wood as well as of earthenware.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Boulers was born in 1097, in Haworth, Yorkshire, England, her father, Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery, was 10 and her mother, Sybil de Falaise, was 23. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Richard FitzUrse. She died in Somerset, England.

fr.Montgomery, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom: Montgomery, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Boulers est née en 1097, à Haworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Falaise, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Richard FitzUrse. Elle est décédée à Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Boulers 1097 in Haworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery 10 und ihre Mutter Sybil de Falaise 23. Sie hatte mit Richard FitzUrse mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb in Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Boulers è nata il nel 1097 nel Haworth, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery, aveva 10 anni e sua madre, Sybil de Falaise, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Richard FitzUrse. Morì nel Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Boulersが1097年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハウオルスで生まれた時，父Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomeryは10歳，母Sybil de Falaiseは23歳であった。彼女はRichard FitzUrseとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女はイギリスソメルセトで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Boulers(이)가 1097년 영국 요르크실르 호르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery(은)는 10세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Falaise(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Richard FitzUrse(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 서머세트에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Boulers nasceu em 1097, em Haworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Falaise, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Richard FitzUrse. Ela faleceu em Somerset, Inglaterra.

ro.Montgomery, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom: Montgomery, Powys, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Boulers родилась в 1097 г. в местности хаворт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Falaise, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Richard FitzUrse. Она умерла в местности сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Boulers nació en 1097, en Haworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery, tenía 10 años y su mamá, Sybil de Falaise, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Richard FitzUrse. Murió en Somerset, Inglaterra.
